prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document discusses rainfall scenarios and their potential impacts on river flows and groundwater, which are relevant to Scotland as part of the UK's climate and environmental concerns. The Met Office forecasts and analyses are applicable across the UK, and understanding these scenarios can inform water management and environmental policy in Scotland.
